matched_comparators.name: Raw OCR text prompt
matched_comparators.notes: No sanitization is applied after OCR extraction.

matched_comparators.name: OCR + regex masking
matched_comparators.notes: Mask numeric identifiers and receipt-style patterns with OCR-text regexes only.

matched_comparators.name: OCR + generic de-identification
matched_comparators.notes: Mask regex hits plus upper receipt header lines without policy routing.

matched_comparators.name: OCR + Presidio receipt de-identification
matched_comparators.notes: Use a real Presidio recognizer stack plus receipt-specific line expansion on OCR text.

matched_comparators.name: OCR + spaCy receipt de-identification
matched_comparators.notes: Use a spaCy NER stack plus receipt-specific line expansion on OCR text.

matched_comparators.name: Proposed multimodal mediation
matched_comparators.notes: Mask sensitive receipt header and contact fields while preserving total-value utility.

mapping_notes: SROIE company, address, and date fields are treated as the protected public receipt-privacy slice, while total is retained as utility-carrying content.
Gold spans are approximated on the OCR transcript by matching receipt-field tokens from the structured target sequence to OCR tokens.
The same declared RapidOCR runtime and named comparator roster are reused so SROIE forms a third public OCR rerun under one wrapper discipline.
